​

### Support &amp; Feedback

Have a bug or suggestion? Open an issue or stop by Discord — your feedback helps improve the framework for every mod that depends on it.

- [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/RimworldCosmere/Lightweave/issues)
- [Discord Community](https://discord.gg/jTcrKfXdYU)

​

### For Mod Authors

Lightweave is published to NuGet as `Cosmere.Lightweave`. Add it to your csproj:

```xml
<PackageReference Include="Cosmere.Lightweave" Version="*" />
```

And declare it as a workshop dependency in your About.xml so subscribers get the runtime DLL automatically.
